mapper.select: SELECT S.STFF_ID, S.STFF_NM, S.STFF_ENG_NM, S.STFF_TYPE_CD, C.CD_NM AS STFF_TYPE_NM, S.STFF_NTNLT, S.STFF_FRGN_YN, S.STFF_BRTH_DT, S.STFF_EXP_YR, S.STFF_ANSL_SAL, S.STFF_STTS_CD, T.TM_ID, T.TM_KR_NM FROM STFF S LEFT JOIN CMN_CD C ON C.CD_ID = 'STFF_TYPE' AND C.CD_VAL = S.STFF_TYPE_CD LEFT JOIN TM T ON T.TM_ID = S.TM_ID WHERE S.STFF_ID = #{stffId}

SELECT A.STFF_ID, A.STFF_ABLT_CD, C.CD_NM AS STFF_ABLT_NM, C.CD_ENG_NM AS STFF_ABLT_ENG_NM, A.STFF_ABLT_VAL FROM STFF_ABLT A LEFT JOIN CMN_CD C ON C.CD_ID = 'STFF_ABLT' AND C.CD_VAL = A.STFF_ABLT_CD WHERE A.STFF_ID = #{stffId} ORDER BY A.STFF_ABLT_CD
